name: adlc-backend-cloud
description: Enterprise / team-scale backend tier (the opt-in scale-up from adlc-backend's solo-scale monolith): containers, Kubernetes orchestration, infrastructure-as-code, async messaging + streaming, distributed data at scale, and progressive delivery; backend-cloud-architect + backend-cloud-reviewer agents. Routes observability to adlc-ops, security to adlc-security, data modeling to adlc-database.
